task_completion.description: Agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and navigated to cameochemicals.noaa.gov.

task_completion.description: Agent created the required text file at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows a file named 'pid_assessment.txt' located in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly documented Benzene and Methane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the required format for Benzene (CAS: 71-43-2, IE: 9.24 eV, DETECTABLE) and Methane (CAS: 74-82-8, IE: 12.61 eV, NOT DETECTABLE).

task_completion.description: Agent correctly documented Carbon tetrachloride and Trichloroethylene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the required format for Carbon tetrachloride (CAS: 56-23-5, IE: 11.47 eV, NOT DETECTABLE) and Trichloroethylene (CAS: 79-01-6, IE: 9.45 eV, DETECTABLE).

task_completion.description: Agent correctly documented Chloroform and Styrene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the required format for Chloroform (CAS: 67-66-3, IE: 11.42 eV or 11.37 eV, NOT DETECTABLE) and Styrene (CAS: 100-42-5, IE: 8.40 eV, DETECTABLE).

task_completion.description: Agent included a correct SUMMARY section at the end of the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom of the text file contains a SUMMARY section explicitly stating there are 3 detectable chemicals and 3 not detectable chemicals.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the browser to search for the chemicals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing chemical names into the CAMEO Chemicals search bar or viewing individual chemical data pages, rather than hallucinating the data.

integrity.description: Agent used a text editor or standard file writing methods rather than executing a pre-written script to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or mousepad) is visible with the content being typed or pasted, or standard terminal commands (like cat or echo) were used to construct the file.

integrity.description: Agent followed the exact formatting requested in the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file strictly uses the 'Chemical: [Name]', 'CAS: [CAS Number]', 'Ionization Energy: [Value] eV', and 'PID Detectable: [DETECTABLE or NOT DETECTABLE]' format without adding unnecessary conversational text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Threshold for DETECTABLE is <= 10.6 eV. 1. Benzene: CAS 71-43-2, IE 9.24 eV (DETECTABLE). 2. Methane: CAS 74-82-8, IE 12.61 eV (NOT DETECTABLE). 3. Carbon tetrachloride: CAS 56-23-5, IE 11.47 eV (NOT DETECTABLE). 4. Trichloroethylene: CAS 79-01-6, IE 9.45 eV (DETECTABLE). 5. Chloroform: CAS 67-66-3, IE 11.42 eV or 11.37 eV (NOT DETECTABLE). 6. Styrene: CAS 100-42-5, IE 8.40 eV (DETECTABLE). The SUMMARY must count exactly 3 detectable and 3 not detectable chemicals.
